summary.zh: 同步高度、透明度与图标状态，清晰表达内容展开和收起。
summary.en: Coordinate height, opacity, and icon state for clear disclosure transitions.

definition.zh: 一个区域平滑地展开或收起高度，以显示或隐藏内容。
definition.en: A disclosure region animates its visible extent while content is opened or closed.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在同一上下文中展开或收起补充内容，并让空间变化可预期。
purpose.en: Expand or collapse supporting content in place with predictable spatial change.

frequency.zh: 适合中高频信息披露；用户反复使用时将时长保持在 180–260ms。
frequency.en: Use for medium- to high-frequency disclosure, keeping repeated interactions around 180–260ms.

trigger.zh: 由标题按钮点击、轻触、Enter 或 Space 触发，aria-expanded 同步更新。
trigger.en: Trigger from heading-button click, tap, Enter, or Space, updating aria-expanded in sync.

enterExit.zh: 展开时高度和透明度同步增长；收起先弱化内容，再释放布局空间。
enterExit.en: Grow height and opacity together on expand; soften content before releasing layout space on collapse.

interruptibility.zh: 反向操作从当前高度立即改向，禁止等待完整展开或收起。
interruptibility.en: Reverse immediately from the current height without waiting for expansion or collapse to finish.

gestureRules.zh: 点击目标覆盖整个标题行，移动端至少 44px；键盘焦点保持在触发按钮。
gestureRules.en: Make the full heading row a target with at least 44px on mobile, keeping keyboard focus on the trigger.

reducedMotion.zh: 立即切换内容可见性和布局高度，保留图标与 aria-expanded 的静态状态。
reducedMotion.en: Switch content visibility and layout height immediately while preserving icon and aria-expanded state.

reviewNotes.zh: 避免用 height:auto 无法插值的实现造成跳变。
reviewNotes.en: Avoid a non-interpolable height:auto implementation that snaps.

reviewNotes.zh: 收起前处理内容内部焦点，防止焦点落入隐藏区域。
reviewNotes.en: Move focus out of content before it becomes hidden.
